{{Infobox character
| name = Eugan
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Corvinus tribe lodge}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|guide}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
}}

''See also: [[Eugan Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Eugan is a raven belonging to Feiora. The bird possesses high levels of perception and communicates messages through caws, which Feiora interprets for others. Eugan has expressed specific concerns regarding [[Alin]], son of [[Torin]], and has observed that [[Leah]] is currently without sufficient allies or guidance. The raven followed Feiora through the Gate and has acted as a companion and a source of navigation for [[Leah]]. As a member of [[Avernus]], the bird is linked to an [[Incarnation]], and there is a suggestion that his kind may eventually pose a threat to [[Leah]].}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Eugan is a perceptive raven who shares a bond with Feiora, often resting upon her padded shoulder. Because of this connection, [[Leah]] instructs Feiora to ensure the bird's absolute safety. Associated with a [[Corvinus tribe]] lodge, Eugan serves as a guide for [[Leah]] within [[Avernus]]. This journey was initiated after the [[Avernus Incarnation]] requested that the raven accompany [[Leah]] to the region.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Eugan]] is a perceptive raven bonded to Feiora.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Eugan]] rests on Feiora's padded shoulder.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Eugan]] is someone [[Leah]] tells Feiora to keep absolutely safe.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Eugan]] is a raven.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13">''City of Light'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Eugan]] is associated with a [[Corvinus tribe]] lodge.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Eugan]] is a guide for [[Leah]] in [[Avernus]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Eugan]] is a raven that accompanies [[Leah]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c18">''City of Light'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Eugan]] was asked by the [[Avernus Incarnation]] to bring [[Leah]] to [[Avernus]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c18" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“Eugan says you're holding something back. He’s a perceptive one, but even I figured that out.”<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
